metadata.description: Redis Technical Support Engineer tooling for Claude Code. Umbrella marketplace — current plugins: tse-jira (Bug/RCA/score). Future plugins: RCA tooling, support-package analyzers, Grafana helpers, etc.

plugins.name: tse-jira
plugins.description: Create Redis Bug Jiras from Zendesk PDFs, multi-cluster RCA Jiras from Zendesk+Jira PDFs, and compute impact scores. Four slash commands: /tse-jira:new (interactive router), /tse-jira:bug, /tse-jira:rca, /tse-jira:score — each command falls back to interactive mode when invoked without args. v0.14 adds: Glean Search for semantically-related Jiras, template-substitution HTML preview (50% faster than write-from-scratch), expand-macro hint markers for long technical sections. Description body holds narrative only; metadata content lives in dedicated custom fields per real Jira UI layout. Dry-run by default.
